items.caption: A shiba inu dog standing on a grassy area. the dog is wearing a green backpack and has a blue leash attached to it. the dog appears to be looking directly at the camera with a somewhat mischievous expression. the background is blurred, but it seems to be an outdoor setting with grass and possibly some shrubs. there is text overlaying the image that reads, "when they fake throw the ball too many times and you decide you'll be better off on your own." the text is in a casual font and is meant to be humorous, suggesting that the dog is pretending to throw a ball but is not actually doing so.
